_INSTRUCTIONS: BEFORE FIRST USE: (1) Train a Soul via `Skill(skill="higgsfield-soul-id", args="train using my photos")` and paste the returned reference_id into `jay_soul_id` below. (2) Optionally create a Marketing Studio avatar and paste its UUID into `jay_marketing_avatar_id`. (3) Populate your own photo database at `output/photos/<your-database>/` and update `fallback_photo_by_keyword` paths. Until (1) is done, the skill falls back to keyword-matched reference photos.
_training_set_notes: Replace this with notes about your training set (real vs AI photos, angle coverage, lighting variety).
default_expression_token: serious, calm intensity, no smile, direct presence
anti_slop_negative: no smiling, no standing and speaking to camera, no corporate framing, no specific hand gestures unless requested, no exaggerated expressions, no AI-slop perfect symmetry, no melted faces, no extra fingers
phone_gesture_exception: The 'phone tap' and 'phone in palm pulses' beats are canonical brand-signature moments and are exempt from the no-hand-gestures rule. All other specific hand gestures (pointing, thumbs up, hand wave, finger-snap, etc.) remain banned unless explicitly requested.
_notes: Edit jay_soul_id after training a Soul Character via the higgsfield-soul-id skill. Until then, the skill's Jay Ad Hook Mode falls back to using the keyword-mapped photo from fallback_photo_by_keyword.
